core_philosophy: Trust through clarity: No decorative noise.
Data is the interface: Metrics are the primary visual element.
Human-centric: Warm tones mixed with clinical precision.

heading.usage_rules: Use for all headings (h1-h4). Tight tracking (-0.02em) for sizes above 24px.

body.usage_rules: Use for all body text, data tables, and UI controls. Excellent for numbers.

cards.classes: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-emerald-600 text-white hover:bg-emerald-700 shadow-sm font-medium px-6 py-2.5 rounded-md transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 font-medium px-6 py-2.5 rounded-md transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-emerald-700 hover:bg-emerald-50 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-colors

inputs.classes: bg-white border-slate-200 focus:border-emerald-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500/20 rounded-md h-11 px-4 text-sm transition-all

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Manrope for all headings. This is non-negotiable for the brand voice.
Do NOT use default shadcn card styles. Remove the heavy shadows. Use 1px borders with very subtle shadows (shadow-sm).
For the Dashboard, use the 'Bento' grid layout. Don't just stack cards vertically.
Use the provided doctor images for the 'Team' and 'Contacts' sections.
Use the hospital images for 'Client Profile' headers.
Ensure high contrast for all text. No light gray text on white backgrounds.
Charts should use the specific color palette: Emerald (Primary), Blue (Secondary), Terracotta (Accent).
